texts.tea_text: Alishan Jin Xuan tea offers a dramatic inversion: a naturally milky, velvety aroma developed to survive the 1,600m alpine freeze. Crisp at first, comforting to the end.

children.name: Tea text
children.text: Alishan Jin Xuan tea offers a dramatic inversion: a naturally milky, velvety aroma developed to survive the 1,600m alpine freeze. Crisp at first, comforting to the end.
